testIdeas.title: Verify product categories filter products correctly
testIdeas.reason: Core functionality to explore products effectively.

testIdeas.title: Verify product pagination navigates correctly
testIdeas.reason: Essential for viewing all products listed on the home page.

testIdeas.title: Verify product details page loads with correct information
testIdeas.reason: Fundamental user journey to inspect products before purchase.

testIdeas.title: Verify successful user registration
testIdeas.reason: Authentication is a critical business flow.

testIdeas.title: Verify registration with existing username fails
testIdeas.reason: Prevent creation of duplicate user accounts.

testIdeas.title: Verify successful user login
testIdeas.reason: Authentication is a critical business flow.

testIdeas.title: Verify login with invalid credentials fails
testIdeas.reason: Ensures security and correct error handling for authentication.

testIdeas.title: Verify successful user logout
testIdeas.reason: Essential for managing user sessions and security.

testIdeas.title: Verify sending a contact message successfully
testIdeas.reason: Important for user communication and support.

testIdeas.title: Verify contact form displays validation errors for empty fields
testIdeas.reason: Ensures proper form validation and user feedback.

testIdeas.title: Verify 'About us' video modal opens and video plays
testIdeas.reason: Informational content should be accessible and functional.

testIdeas.title: Verify navigation to the Cart page
testIdeas.reason: Shopping cart is a core business flow.

risks: Product images lack meaningful alt text, impacting accessibility for screen reader users.
Product prices are rendered as H5 headings, which is semantically incorrect and affects document outline.
The 'About us' video player's accessibility (e.g., keyboard navigation, ARIA labels for controls) needs thorough verification.
Generic error label elements for forms (#errors, #errorl) may not provide specific or contextual error messages to users.
Product descriptions are truncated with 'text-overflow: ellipsis' without an clear option to view full text, affecting usability.
Modal dialogs (Contact, Sign Up, Log In, About Us) need full accessibility checks for keyboard trapping and focus management.
Color contrast of text elements, especially within navigation and footer, should be verified to meet WCAG standards.
